content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: Advice Request Meeting Participants

Date: May 12, 1983
No.: M-83-129

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
Barbara A. Milman

Subject: 18704 - Advice Request Question 5/12/83

Having reviewed the transcript of the Commission meeting at which Section 18704 was originally adopted, I have concluded that the Commission probably intended that it be given a narrow interpretation. Therefore, it is my view that we should advise that the term "employer" only refers to an employer in the ordinary sense -- that is a business entity such as a partnership or corporation -- and not to individual customers or clients of an official's business.
